# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-payment-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.stripe.com
  - api.paypal.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: payment-gateway-routing
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.stripe.com
  - api.paypal.com
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: "/v1/charges"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.stripe.com
      weight: 100
    timeout: 30s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 10s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure,refused-stream
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: api.paypal.com
      weight: 100
    timeout: 30s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database-postgres
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - prod-postgres.c9xyzabc1234.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  addresses:
  - 10.20.30.40/32
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: postgres
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database-mongodb
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - prod-mongodb-cluster.mongodb.net
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 27017
    name: mongodb
    protocol: TCP
  - number: 27018
    name: mongodb-replica1
    protocol: TCP
  - number: 27019
    name: mongodb-replica2
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - prod-redis.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 6379
    name: redis
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api-google-maps
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - maps.googleapis.com
  - "*.googleapis.com"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: google-apis-routing
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.googleapis.com"
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: "/maps/api"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: maps.googleapis.com
      weight: 100
    timeout: 15s
    retries:
      attempts: 2
      perTryTimeout: 5s
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: maps.googleapis.com
      weight: 100
    timeout: 10s
---

kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api-twilio
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.twilio.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: twilio-routing
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.twilio.com
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: "/2010-04-01/Accounts"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.twilio.com
      weight: 100
    timeout: 20s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 7s
      retryOn: 5xx,gateway-error,connect-failure
---

metadata:
  name: sendgrid-routing
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.sendgrid.com
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: api.sendgrid.com
      weight: 100

    retries:
      attempts: 2
      perTryTimeout: 10s

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - s3.amazonaws.com
  - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
  - s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
  - mybucket.s3.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: s3-routing
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
  - s3.amazonaws.com
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: s3.amazonaws.com
      weight: 100
    timeout: 60s
---

  hosts:
  - kafka-broker-1.example.com
  - kafka-broker-2.example.com
  - kafka-broker-3.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api-auth0
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - myapp.auth0.com
  - "*.auth0.com"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: auth0-routing
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - myapp.auth0.com
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: "/oauth/token"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: myapp.auth0.com
      weight: 100
    timeout: 10s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 3s
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: myapp.auth0.com
      weight: 100
    timeout: 15s
---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api-openai
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.openai.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: openai-routing
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.openai.com
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: "/v1/chat/completions"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.openai.com
      weight: 100
    timeout: 60s
    retries:
      attempts: 2
      perTryTimeout: 30s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: api.openai.com
      weight: 100
    timeout: 45s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-cloudflare-dns
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - cloudflare-dns.com
  - 1.1.1.1
  - 1.0.0.1
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 53
    name: dns-udp
    protocol: UDP
  - number: 53
    name: dns-tcp
    protocol: TCP
  - number: 853
    name: dns-over-tls
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 1.1.1.1
  - address: 1.0.0.1
---

  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 587
    name: smtp-tls

  - number: 465
    name: smtp-ssl
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-vault
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - vault.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 8200
    name: vault-api
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vault-routing
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - vault.example.com
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: vault.example.com
      weight: 100
    timeout: 10s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 3s
      retryOn: 5xx,connect-failure
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: wildcard-external-apis
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.api.example.com"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-services-tls
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: "*.googleapis.com"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 10s
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 50
        http2MaxRequests: 100
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 2
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: payment-gateway-tls
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: api.stripe.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: api.stripe.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        http2MaxRequests: 50
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 1
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: database-connection-pool
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: prod-postgres.c9xyzabc1234.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 200
        connectTimeout: 30s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
